# Callouts And Embeds

## Callouts

Use callouts for emphasized information.

Examples:

- `> [!note]`
- `> [!tip]`
- `> [!warning]`
- `> [!important]`

Keep them sparse. They should improve scanability, not replace structure.

## Embeds

Use embeds when inline rendering helps the reader.

Examples:

- `![[Note]]`
- `![[Note#Heading]]`
- `![[image.png]]`
- `![[document.pdf#page=3]]`

Prefer links over embeds when the page would become visually noisy.
